title: Comprehensive Molecular Characterization of the Mitochon-drial Genome of the Takin Lungworm Varestrongylus ele-guneniensis (Strongylida: Protostrongylidae)
author: Yue Xie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Table S1: List of the nine primer pairs for PCR amplification and their positions in  V. eleguneniensis  mtDNA; Table S2: Nucleotide contents of the mtDNAs of the forty-five Strongylida nematodes; Table S3: Gene lengths in the mtDNAs of the forty-five reported Strongylida nematodes.
steps_raw: Table S1: List of the nine primer pairs for PCR amplification and their positions in  V. eleguneniensis  mtDNA; Table S2: Nucleotide contents of the mtDNAs of the forty-five Strongylida nematodes; Table S3: Gene lengths in the mtDNAs of the forty-five reported Strongylida nematodes.
